hero_title: Your business in Costa Rica deserves a website that sells for you
hero_subtitle: Professional, modern web design ready to attract clients. No hassle.
services_title: Web design in Costa Rica for your business
service_1_items: Turn visitors into customers with a page designed to sell.
service_2_items: Your business visible 24/7 with a professional site that builds trust.
service_3_items: Sell your products online with an attractive, easy-to-use store.
service_4_items: Your menu accessible from any phone, no apps, no printing.
projects_subtitle: Each project solved a real problem for a real business
project_kyomu_desc: Asian food business that went from taking orders by DM to an organized WhatsApp system. More orders, less confusion.
project_kyomu_tags: WhatsApp Orders • Visual Menu • Real Business
project_english_desc: Platform that lets you practice English without sign-up or payment. Quick exercises that build confidence and results from the first use.
project_luna_desc: Beauty business that now receives automatic bookings without calls or back-and-forth messages. Full schedule with less effort.
project_tropical_desc: Online smoothie store where customers build custom orders and buy in seconds. A shopping experience that hooks.
project_monster_desc: Landing page that communicates a brand's essence in seconds. Design that converts visitors into fans from the first scroll.
project_delivery_desc: Tool that lets businesses track deliveries in real-time and export reports. Full business control on a single screen.
project_dynamis_desc: Complete platform for a motocross community: store, training, and maps. An entire niche ecosystem in one place.
why_1_desc: Your website ready in days, not months. Agile process with no runaround so you start seeing results soon.
why_2_desc: I explain everything in simple words. You focus on your business, I handle the tech.
why_3_desc: Modern design that builds trust. Your business looks like the big brands, without the agency price tag.
contact_desc: Tell me what you need and I'll reply within 24 hours. No strings attached.
